---
title: "Digital Resilience"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Ensuring business continuity in an evolving threat landscape"
description: "Digital resilience services: business continuity planning, disaster recovery, resilient architecture, and adaptive frameworks for operational continuity."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:60vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Digital<br>Resilience</h1>
    <p>Adaptive frameworks that ensure operational continuity when it matters most.</p>
    <a href="#pillars" class="ev-btn">Learn more</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">99.9%</div><div class="m-nl">Uptime target</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">&lt;4h</div><div class="m-nl">Recovery time</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">ISO</div><div class="m-nl">22301 aligned</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">24/7</div><div class="m-nl">Monitoring</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOUR PILLARS -->
<div class="m-s" id="pillars" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Resilience, simplified</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four pillars working together to keep your business running.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Business Continuity"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pillar 1</div><h3>Business Continuity</h3><p>Maintain essential functions during and after disruptions.</p></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Disaster Recovery"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pillar 2</div><h3>Disaster Recovery</h3><p>Rapid restoration with minimal downtime and data loss.</p></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Architecture"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pillar 3</div><h3>Architecture Review</h3><p>Defense-in-depth design with zero-trust principles.</p></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Risk"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pillar 4</div><h3>Risk Assessment</h3><p>Identify gaps and build a prioritized improvement roadmap.</p></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE ROW -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Resilient infrastructure"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Built to endure.<br>Designed to recover.</h2>
        <p>We help you plan for the worst and build for the best. From business impact analysis through tabletop exercises, every critical function gets a recovery strategy with clear RTOs and RPOs — aligned to ISO 22301 and NIST frameworks.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Assess your resilience</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROCESS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>How we build resilience</h2>
    <p class="sub">From assessment to continuous improvement.</p>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A;">1</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4><span style="color:inherit;">Assessment</span></h4><div class="up-meta">Business impact analysis, threat modeling, and gap identification across your organization.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A;">2</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4><span style="color:inherit;">Strategy</span></h4><div class="up-meta">Recovery strategies, RTO/RPO definitions, and architecture recommendations tailored to your risk profile.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A;">3</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4><span style="color:inherit;">Implementation</span></h4><div class="up-meta">Backup systems, failover configurations, runbooks, and automated recovery procedures.</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item" style="border-bottom:none;">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border-radius:50%; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A;">4</div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4><span style="color:inherit;">Testing & Improvement</span></h4><div class="up-meta">Tabletop exercises, disaster simulations, and continuous refinement based on lessons learned.</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RELATED -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Related services</h2>
    <p class="sub">Resilience works best with the right foundation.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/security/" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Security</h3><p>24/7 SOC monitoring and incident response.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/services/nis2/" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="NIS2"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Meet EU regulatory requirements for continuity.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/services/cloud/" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Cloud"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cloud Services</h3><p>Redundant, geo-distributed infrastructure.</p></div></div></a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Start building<br>resilience today</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at your continuity readiness.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Book a consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Gap report in 5 days
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
